regional_cost_note: Painters in Auckland typically charge $35–$65/hr or quote per job. A standard 3-bedroom exterior repaint costs $5,000–$15,000. Always get 3 quotes and confirm Master Painters membership.

businesses.name: Auckland City Painters Ltd
businesses.known_for: Registered Master Painter and Gold Awards holder; free in-home colour consultation, Resene paints, 5-star workmanship guarantee.

businesses.name: Smart Painters Auckland
businesses.known_for: 200+ five-star Google reviews; one of Auckland's most trusted painting teams for interior and exterior residential work.

businesses.name: Superior Painters
businesses.known_for: Consistently 5.0 across all reviews; North Shore specialists known for professionalism and reliability.

businesses.name: A&B Advanced Painting
businesses.known_for: Only five-star Google ratings; Dulux and Resene accredited painters with interior, exterior, and commercial expertise.

businesses.name: Home Shield Painters
businesses.known_for: Professional interior and exterior painting since 1986; 30+ years combined experience, commercial and residential.

businesses.name: The House Painters Auckland
